name: MikroTik mANTBox ax 15s
title: MikroTik mANTBox ax 15s
short_description: The MikroTik mANTBox ax 15s is designed to simplify and enhance outdoor wireless networking. A drop-in Wi-Fi 6 upgrade for the popular mANTBox dual-band sector antenna base stations. This powerful device is ideal for providing high-speed, stable, and secure point-to-multipoint connectivity across vast distances, with potential coverage up to 20 kilometers under optimal conditions.
description: The MikroTik mANTBox ax 15s is designed to simplify and enhance outdoor wireless networking. A drop-in Wi-Fi 6 upgrade for the popular mANTBox dual-band sector antenna base stations. This powerful device is ideal for providing high-speed, stable, and secure point-to-multipoint connectivity across vast distances, with potential coverage up to 20 kilometers under optimal conditions.

detailed_description.heading: Unmatched Wireless Performance
detailed_description.text:
The MikroTik mANTBox ax 15s with a Manufacture Part Number L22UGS-5HaxD2HaxD-15S is designed to simplify and enhance outdoor wireless networking. A drop-in Wi-Fi 6 upgrade for the popular mANTBox dual-band sector antenna base stations. This powerful device is ideal for providing high-speed, stable, and secure point-to-multipoint connectivity across vast distances, with potential coverage up to 20 kilometers under optimal conditions.

Upgrading your setup to Wi-Fi 6 with the mANTBox ax 15s not only boosts speeds significantly—up to 40% in the 5 GHz spectrum and up to 90% in the 2.4 GHz spectrum—but also enhances network security with WPA3 encryption. The technology ensures more reliable connections even when the network serves a large number of users and improves energy efficiency through features like Target Wake Time, which is beneficial for both operational costs and environmental impact. The package comes complete with everything needed for setup, including a Gigabit PoE injector, power supply, MikroTik quickMOUNT pro, and all necessary mounting hardware. This comprehensive setup ensures that users can achieve optimal performance and alignment right out of the box.

detailed_description.heading: Advanced Hardware Configuration
detailed_description.text: Powered by an ARM-based IPQ-5010 CPU with two cores operating at 800 MHz, the mANTBox ax 15s is equipped to handle demanding network tasks with efficiency. It boasts 256 MB of RAM and 128 MB of NAND storage, facilitating the smooth operation of RouterOS v7. The device's dual-core ARM CPUs and the latest 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6 dual-band radios significantly enhance signal stability, speed, and responsiveness, making the mANTBox ax 15s a top-tier solution for outdoor wireless needs.

detailed_description.heading: Unlock the Power of Wi-Fi 6
detailed_description.text: The mANTBox ax 15s is engineered to excel in both the 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz bands, supporting Wi-Fi 6 technology. On the 2.4 GHz band, it achieves a maximum data rate of 574 Mbit/s with an antenna gain of 12 dBi, while the 5 GHz band reaches up to 2400 Mbit/s with a 15 dBi gain. This dual-band capability allows the device to provide broad coverage and high-speed connectivity, crucial for both consumer and commercial networking needs.

detailed_description.heading: Connectivity and Power Options
detailed_description.text: The mANTBox ax 15s offers versatile connectivity options including one Gigabit Ethernet port and one 2.5G supported SFP port, enhancing its utility as a multi-role device capable of handling diverse networking scenarios. It also features a USB type A port for additional connectivity. The unit is powered through two DC inputs, accepting a range from 12-28 V, and can also be powered via 18-28 V Passive PoE, offering flexibility in deployment and energy sourcing. Moreover, The device’s power consumption is efficient, requiring only 21 W at maximum operation and 11 W without attachments, thanks to its passive cooling system.

detailed_description.heading: Designed for the Outdoors
detailed_description.text:
The robust IP55-rated enclosure of the mANTBox ax 15s ensures it is well-protected against environmental elements, making it suitable for all-weather deployments. It is suitable for harsh outdoor environments, with a tested ambient operating temperature range from -40°C to 70°C.Moreover, as stated before, its design also includes features that simplify installation and management. For instance, the casing can be easily accessed and the device securely mounted using the included hose clamp, fastening set, and the MikroTik quickMOUNT pro. This advanced wall mount adapter allows turning antenna within 140° both horizontally and vertically which is crucial for optimizing the long-range signal capabilities. The mANTBox ax 15s is compliant with major international standards, holding certifications from CE, FCC, IC, EAC, and ROHS. This compliance ensures that the device meets global regulatory requirements and can be deployed confidently in various markets.

It also features sophisticated monitoring tools such as a PCB temperature monitor and voltage monitor, the mANTBox ax 15s helps maintain operational integrity and preempt potential issues. An audible beeper adds an additional layer of utility for diagnostic purposes or alerts.

comments.name: Richard
comments.text:
Excellent. I love it very much. I have ordered 15 pcs to Liberia.
My challenge with it is how to configure it for 20km.

comments.name: Serhii
comments.text: Very good performance and stable signal even after several doors.

comments.name: Richard
comments.text:
Short wifi distance connection for phone and laptop (280m-290m). I expected (600m-700m) Wifi signal. Wifi signal is reduced by tree.
I expected more but I see Little.
